testcase.name: Checking the questions end point should return code 400 when missing the exam parameter
Checking the platforms end point should return a list that contains salesforce
Checking the salesforce exams end point should return a list of size 1 that contains the platform admin exam
Sending an OPTIONS request to the base-url should return response code 200 with no body
Checking the GCP exams end point should return nothing
Checking the exams end point should return code 400 when missing the platform parameter
